sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82291" key="peristrofi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστροφ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82291.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wooden implement that is turned round, strickle</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:170" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.170</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.113</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n82291.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">handle for turning a fuller's press</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
